package.name: patrol_logging
package.description: Logging & replay recording for the patrol-drone stack (docset 05-logging-replay). M7 owns the record side: a ROS-free recorder core (bag naming + `ros2 bag record` argv construction + the JSON metadata sidecar) and an includable record.launch.py that 02's mission_patrol.launch.py attaches, so every mission run produces exactly one MCAP bag named patrol_<missionId>_<timestamp>.mcap in a known output dir with no manual step. The recorder runs `ros2 bag record --storage mcap` (NOT sqlite3) over a broad topic set (config/recorded_topics.yaml). M8 adds the upload daemon / DGX ingest / replay regression test (separate dirs); they are not part of this package.
